strengths: 20 years of continuous software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure with proven ability to build and ship production platforms
Strong technical foundation spanning cloud (AWS), DevOps, CI/CD, and multiple programming languages enabling cross-domain collaboration with teams
Track record of sharing knowledge and influencing others through founding GISCollective, creating educational content, and organizing engineering communities
concerns: AI expertise is very recent (less than 1 year) and focused on infrastructure and tooling rather than demonstrated strategic products or platforms built with AI
No evidence of director-level strategic leadership, customer advisory relationships, or influencing large-scale technology adoption decisions
Missing preferred qualifications: no Master's/PhD in AI, no published AI expertise, and entrepreneurial ventures show technical execution rather than strategic business success
response.justification: Szabo is a strong technical engineer with 20 years of experience building and shipping products. However, the role requires director-level strategic leadership on AI—advising customers and partners on technology adoption—not engineering implementation. His AI experience is recent and infrastructure-focused rather than strategic or product-focused. While his technical breadth is an asset, the lack of demonstrated strategic advisory experience and recognized AI expertise represents a significant gap against the role's core requirements.
